title: Cuneiform Tablet #0240: Middle Assyrian Administrative
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Middle Assyrian period — a administrative document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Middle Assyrian period. Administrative document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records administrative matters typical of Middle Assyrian period administrative or literary practice.
